title: Senior Frontend Engineer (React)
description:
We're hiring a Senior Frontend Engineer to lead the development of our customer-facing React applications. You'll own architecture decisions across a TypeScript codebase, mentor mid-level engineers, and partner with product and design to ship polished, accessible UIs.

Responsibilities:
- Build and maintain large-scale React applications with TypeScript.
- Design reusable UI component libraries with attention to accessibility (WCAG 2.1).
- Drive performance work: bundle analysis, code-splitting, lazy loading, Core Web Vitals.
- Lead front-end testing strategy with Jest, React Testing Library, and Cypress.
- Collaborate with backend engineers on REST and GraphQL API contracts.
- Mentor mid- and junior-level frontend engineers in code review and pairing sessions.

Must-have skills:
- 5+ years of professional frontend development.
- Deep React experience including Hooks, Context, and modern patterns.
- Strong JavaScript and TypeScript fundamentals.
- HTML5, CSS3, responsive layout, and CSS-in-JS or utility-first CSS (Tailwind).
- Webpack or Vite, Babel, npm/yarn build pipelines.
- Git, GitHub workflows, code review experience.
- Experience with React state management (Redux, Zustand, or Context).

Nice to have:
- Vue.js or other component framework background.
- Storybook for component documentation.
- E2E testing with Cypress or Playwright.
- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions).
- Figma or design-system collaboration experience.
